Event: Magic Well - May 2025
Event Date: 07/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A219


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Magic Well
Magic Well Junk Chest
Emerald Casket Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Gorgon's Eye
Meteorites fall on 2 random enemy units.
Each meteorite deals 350000 magic damage on impact and turns the target into a rock for 3 sec. The target can't move and takes 45% more damage. The target also takes 125000 magic damage every second for the duration.
When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 150000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 300000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
